description: signature.sig.signatures[1].key_id substituted with attacker-supplied string 'issuer-evil-key-attempted-attack' while manifest.signing.signatures[1].key_id is preserved. Surfaces at Check 1 step 7 cross-check (c): b.Signature.Signatures[i].KeyID != b.Manifest.Signing.Signatures[i].KeyID. Short-circuits BEFORE crypto verification via failV2; both algorithm_verdicts emit as fail per spec §18.10.

modifications.rationale: Spec §18.7 step 2 mandates signature.sig and manifest.signing agree on key_id per algorithm. A tampered signature.sig that disagrees with manifest.signing is a tampering signal detected BEFORE cryptographic verification.

expected_failures: check 1 (manifest signature): cross-check fails at step 7 — signatures[1].key_id 'issuer-evil-key-attempted-attack' disagrees with manifest.signing.signatures[1].key_id 'issuer-dev-v2-ml-dsa-65'. algorithm_verdicts cardinality 2 with both fail (failV2 short-circuit per spec §18.10 conformance contract).
